'''B1-A air battle droid''' were [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] in the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] that utilized [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpacks]] and a personal [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]].

==Characteristics==
Their design shared design characteristics with that of the [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]] though were more bulky in appearance in a similar vein as the [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droid]].

These [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were equipped with two short blades, arm-mounted [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], and a [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] that could block [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. In addition, they possessed a built-in [[Repulsor pack/Legends|repulsor pack]] allowing them to hover on the battlefield and gave them a high degree of mobility allowing them to either harass enemies from a distance or charge at them in close quarter combat.

There were high hopes for the design, but it was easy for [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] to shoot them down because they had a weak spot on their wings. If one was shot, then it lost control.

==History==
[[File:Droids_and_Jedi_on_Invisible_Hand.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Air droids and a [[B2 grapple droid/Legends|B2 grapple droid]] fighting Kenobi and Skywalker on the ''Invisible Hand''.]]

A number of air battle droids were present on the [[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']] during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]]. These units were destroyed by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] when they boarded the [[Providence-class carrier/destroyer/Legends|Providence-class carrier/destroyer]] to free [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

More units were present on the planet [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]] where they battled against [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[High Jedi General/Legends|General]] Obi-Wan Kenobi.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' video game]] {{1st}}
